problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
